name: Getabec Public Company Limited
summary: Getabec Public Company Limited, together with its subsidiaries, manufactures and distributes steam and hot water boilers in Thailand and internationally. The company offers steam, hot water, waste heat, biomass, coal circulating fluidized bed, double flame tube, and water tube boilers; thermal oil heaters; and getabeckessel, and heat recovery and quick steam generators, as well as Smart Boilers 4.0, a boiler monitoring system. It also provides boiler plants engineering, installation, erection, commissioning, maintenance, and repair services, as well as offers spare parts. The company was formerly known as German-Thai Boiler Engineering Cooperation Company Limited and changed its name to Getabec Public Company Limited in September 2015. Getabec Public Company Limited was founded in 1983 and is based in Bangkok, Thailand.
